final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing brand poster for RAN QIU, designed for brand marketing and social media sharing.

Style/medium: brand poster, Eastern aesthetic, minimalist design
Composition: generous negative space, shallow depth of field effect
Subject: brand logo "RAN QIU" integrated with natural autumn elements
Scene/backdrop: warm autumn atmosphere with poetic and serene mood
Lighting/mood: golden hour, warm and healing
Color palette: #8B3A1E (deep autumn brown-red), #E8DCCB (beige), #D4A574 (golden brown), warm tones throughout
Materials/textures: natural textures, soft gradients
Text (verbatim): RAN QIU
Constraints: must reflect Eastern aesthetics, minimalism, natural poetry, warm healing qualities
Avoid: cluttered composition, cool tones, harsh lighting, generic stock-photo aesthetic
